backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (UserProfile, Service, ServiceCategory, Address) and backend logic for a home-service marketplace, including role-based access control, user approval, profile management, service/category CRUD, and booking operations.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three admin-panel-related features (routing fix, navigation link, RBAC guard) to their implementing files, component dependencies, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of key frontend source files, describing their roles and notable fixes such as auth-gated React Query hooks and admin access guard improvements.
frontend/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind CSS and defines CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark themes.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that initializes app mode (customer/technician/admin) from the URL path, manages the full customer booking flow and navigation, and renders the appropriate top-level page component.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminDashb: Admin dashboard component displaying KPI cards (bookings, revenue, technicians) and a recent-bookings table with static mock data and color-coded status badges.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminSideb: Admin panel sidebar component with navigation links for all admin sections, a logout button that clears Internet Identity and React Query cache, and a branded header.
frontend/src/components/admin/BookingsMa: Admin panel component for viewing and managing bookings with filtering by status, date, and search. Supports assigning technicians and transitioning booking statuses through defined valid state flows using mock data.
frontend/src/components/admin/ReportsScr: Admin reports screen with tabs for revenue analytics and technician performance, displaying bar charts of daily/monthly revenue and a sortable technician performance table using mock data.
frontend/src/components/admin/ServicesMa: Admin component for managing service categories and individual services, supporting create/edit/delete operations via React Query hooks with a modal form and confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/components/admin/Technician: Admin component for managing technicians using mock data, allowing adding new technicians, approving documents, and toggling active/suspended status via modals and confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/components/admin/UsersManag: Admin user management component that fetches user approvals via React Query, supports searching by principal ID, and allows blocking/unblocking users with paginated display.
frontend/src/components/customer/Account: Displays the customer account page with user profile info (name, phone, email), a menu of account options (addresses, notifications, security, help), and a logout button. Admin users also see a shortcut to the Admin Panel.
frontend/src/components/customer/AddAddr: A modal dialog form that allows users to add a new saved address with fields for label, phone, address lines, city, state, zip, and a default flag, submitting via the useSaveAddress mutation.
frontend/src/components/customer/Address: A screen for selecting a delivery/service address from saved addresses, with options to add a new address via a modal and set a default, proceeding to the next booking step on selection.
frontend/src/components/customer/AuthFlo: A two-step authentication UI that collects a phone number, then shows an OTP entry screen before triggering Internet Identity login for passwordless sign-in.
frontend/src/components/customer/Booking: Displays a booking review screen showing cart items, address, date/time, notes, and payment method selection; after confirmation it shows a success screen with the booking ID and copy functionality.
A simple screen with a textarea for the user to enter special instructions for the technician before proceeding to the payment step.
Displays a customer's bookings list with status filter tabs and mock booking data. Supports drilling into a booking detail view and shows status badges with color coding.
frontend/src/components/customer/BottomN: Renders a fixed bottom navigation bar for the customer app with four tabs: Home, Bookings, Rewards, and Account. Highlights the active tab with primary color styling.
frontend/src/components/customer/CartSum: Shows the customer's cart with service items, quantity controls, remove buttons, and a total price. Provides back navigation and a proceed-to-checkout button.
frontend/src/components/customer/DateTim: Allows customers to select a booking date from the next 7 days and a time slot from a predefined list. Renders a horizontal date scroller and a grid of time slot buttons.
frontend/src/components/customer/HomeScr: Renders the customer home screen with a banner slider, category grid, featured services, and a search bar. Fetches categories and services from backend hooks and supports navigation callbacks.
frontend/src/components/customer/Profile: Modal dialog that collects first name, last name, phone, and email to create a new customer profile on first login. Submits the profile via a mutation hook and shows success/error toasts.
frontend/src/components/customer/Rewards: Displays a customer's wallet balance, referral code (with copy-to-clipboard), referral stats, and mock transaction history. Uses mock data for transactions and referral counts.
frontend/src/components/customer/Service: Shows detailed information for a single service including image, price, duration, description, and an add-to-cart button, with loading skeleton and unavailable states.
Lists all services under a given category fetched via React Query, rendering each as a card with image, rating, duration, price, and add-to-cart action.
frontend/src/components/layouts/AdminLay: Wraps admin pages with a sidebar and a scrollable main content area, passing active section state and change handler to AdminSidebar.
frontend/src/components/layouts/MobileCo: Provides a centered, max-width mobile shell container that constrains child content to a phone-sized viewport with full dynamic viewport height.
frontend/src/components/shared/Notificat: Renders a bell icon with an unread badge that toggles a dropdown list of notifications, supporting mark-as-read and mark-all-read actions via the useNotifications hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the Internet Identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBookingFlow.ts: Manages the full booking flow state (cart items, address, date, time slot, payment method, etc.) with memoized action callbacks and derived cart totals.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, wrapping DFINITY's AuthClient to expose login, logout, and identity state with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useNotifications.ts: Custom hook that fetches and manages app notifications using React Query, with mock data and mutations to mark individual or all notifications as read.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes React Query hooks for backend interactions including user profile, addresses, service categories, and admin operations via the canister actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter font, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark theme colors, status indicators, and utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the root DOM element.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin panel page that gates access behind Internet Identity authentication and an admin role check, then renders section-based management views inside an AdminLayout.
frontend/src/pages/TechnicianApp.tsx: Mobile-oriented technician app page that displays assigned jobs with status update controls, extra item billing, and earnings/profile tabs, using mock data and requiring authentication.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme tokens (colors via OKLCH variables, border radii, shadows, fonts, keyframe animations) and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing a multi-panel home service marketplace app (customer, technician, admin) built on Firebase, listing architectural notes, known issues, and implemented feature inventory.
